subject: fix(ui): address review findings — accessibility, inline styles, constants
body:
Fix all 6 findings from code review:

1. DetailPane: Move inline style to .detail-pane-empty CSS class
   (CLAUDE.md prohibits static inline styles)
2. HamburgerMenu: Add arrow key navigation between menu items
   (WAI-ARIA menu pattern expects up/down arrow support)
3. HamburgerMenu: Import version from package.json instead of
   hardcoding "v1.0.0" (stays in sync on version bumps)
4. QuickGuide: Focus modal container on open via useEffect +
   tabIndex={-1} (keyboard users need to know focus moved)
5. ShowMoreButton: Remove className prop, unify spacing to 12px
   margin-top in CSS (was inconsistent across grid vs list contexts)
6. Centralize pagination limits in PAGE_LIMITS constant in state.js
   (was scattered as magic numbers across 8 files)

Tags: accessibility, ui, refactor, clean
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
